title: Eva FINAL Winter 2015 rumor again again
display_title: Eva FINAL Winter 2015 rumor again again
wikitext:
[]: Eva FINAL Winter 2015 rumor (again again) Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 09, 2015 10:48 pm This just Japanese fans hoping? Was linked to by a Twitter follower of mine, but I thought this was just another old rumor: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Post by Ray » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:01 pm 1) It's too soon. 2) titles doesn't really sound believable 3) probably a hoax

[]: Post by darkrising474 » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:07 pm If you click on the source in the article it brings you to buzz-plus and there is a trailer there of 3.0+1.0.

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:09 pm Google translate is as spotty and unreliable as usual, but it says this was found in the July 16th issue of Shukan Bunshun magazine? It's not impossible and it leaves the timeframe rather vague, but that does seem awfully soon considering we've heard virtually nothing about the movie yet. Didn't we have the first trailer for Q by this time?

[]: Post by darkrising474 » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:12 pm Well the trailer kind of looks fake, its just scenes from the previous rebuild movies and I think the first part of the trailer is from some drawn out video related to 3.0. Any confirmation if this is real? I really like the title, did not see that one coming.

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:16 pm Ray wrote: 1) It's too soon. 2) titles doesn't really sound believable 3) probably a hoax

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:16 pm The trailer's definitely fake. If you follow the link to the youtube page it was published in late 2013.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:30 pm The trailer's old and fake, yep. The original article states the source for the Winter 2015 date is page number 139 of "Shukan Bunshun" from July 16, 2015. It's also speculated due to Utada working on a new album/song after the birth of her child: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17595/Hikkis-childbirth-and-new-album-announcements/ It's also 3 years from the previous work (November 2012 for Eva Q). So...speculation again?

[]: Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:43 pm Well Anno wouldn't be working on it right now anyway. So I don't see the debate here.

[]: Post by Ray » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:50 pm He hasn't even started production on it, and he's delaying working on it to do his Godzilla film. Anno, I don't want to be rude, but you aren't getting any younger. Worse than anything is a lack of closure.

[]: Post by Sicarius VI » Thu Jul 09, 2015 11:56 pm ^ Yup. Also for the title, I would suggest- You can (not) Run.

[]: Post by Stillborn » Fri Jul 10, 2015 12:01 am Ray wrote: He hasn't even started production on it, and he's delaying working on it to do his Godzilla film. Anno, I don't want to be rude, but you aren't getting any younger. Worse than anything is a lack of closure.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Jul 10, 2015 2:03 am If it ain't on the official site, it's fake. I can't recall the amount of times I've said it. As much as I want Shin to come out, I've gotten fake-hyped enough times that seeing false reports just bores me and makes me wish I had better things to spend my energy on.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 10, 2015 4:55 am Yep. If it ain't on the official site I'll ignore it. This isn't exactly the kind of project that is going to have leaks. The first news will always come from the website. Now Fall 2016 could happen if Anno laid a good production schedule for his team & dives right into it once he finishes work on Godzilla. But Summer/Fall 2017 (the 20th Anniversary of End of Evangelion) is probably what we're looking at.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 10, 2015 6:54 am It's the same magazine that made this claim last year based on the Utada last album rumor. To keep in mind: -back then it was not Utada's view, it was some random record company's source's wishful thinking -the record company has no control over a movie release just to coincide with their own album -this new rumor is the magazine doubling down on the two above now that the new album has been actually announced by Utada and this is again not coming from Utada herself or a reliable source Both Evafan comment section and twitter is full of people calling bullshit on this.

[]: Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Jul 10, 2015 8:43 am Ray wrote: Anno, I don't want to be rude, but you aren't getting any younger. Worse than anything is a lack of closure.

[]: Post by hui43210 » Fri Jul 10, 2015 1:24 pm Seeing as they promoted 3.0 about 1.5 years in advance, I'd doubt they'd drop the release so short in advance and with little fanfare, Eva is kinda big in Japan. The only way I'd see that happen is if the Khara shorts somehow ended with a release date, but 2016 is far more realistic.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 10, 2015 5:47 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: It's the same magazine that made this claim last year based on the Utada last album rumor

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 10, 2015 9:25 pm Looking through the comments on the Evafan blog reporting this, on top of Animator Expo and Godzilla getting in the way of work some are saying releasing it to compete with Star Wars Episode 7 would be a bad idea

[]: Post by Lennik » Fri Jul 10, 2015 10:38 pm Stillborn wrote: Maybe he plans to pull of R.R Martin and die before series is concluded as a final act of spite towards audience. I've seen enough paralels between these two, to deem it possible
